manualPlacementLock.reason: Manual weapon placement is repository truth. Socket solver output is diagnostic-only and must not overwrite src/rig-profiles.js.
manualPlacementLock.unlockPolicy: Only a separately confirmed user request for an exact placement may change production weapon placement values.

stopReason: Manual weapon placement is repository truth. Socket solver output is diagnostic-only and must not overwrite src/rig-profiles.js.
correctionSpace: Meshy actor/model local space applied as weaponProxy.modelLocalOffset delta

rotationAdjustmentReportedOnly.note: This solver only evaluates socket position. Socket rotation is not applied or proposed.
